title: Compiler
subtitle: Contains methods related to the compiling code.

members.name: messageForString
members.description: Returns the compiled message object for aString.

members.name: messageForString2
members.description:
Returns the compiled message object for aString. (Runs raw string against
    lexer directly.)

members.name: messageForTokens
members.description: Returns the compiled message object for the given token list.

members.name: tokensForString
members.description: Returns a list of token objects lexed from the input string.
